title: CHWY Q2 2023 Earnings Call and Results
text: Chewy reported Q2 2023 net sales of $2.78 billion, improved 14.3% year over year, with a gross margin of 28.3% that increased 20 basis points year-over-year. The company reported net income of $18.9 million and adjusted EBITDA of $86.9 million, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 3.1%. Prior to earnings, the consensus estimate for quarterly sales was pegged at $2.763 billion, showing 13.7% increase from the year-ago quarter. The consensus mark for earnings was 11 cents per share, reflecting year-over-year growth of 120% from 5 cents per share in the year-earlier quarter. For the third quarter, net sales were forecasted to land between $2.74 billion and $2.76 billion (8-9% year-over-year growth). Full-year 2023 net sales outlook was $11.5 billion to $11.35 billion, translating to approximately 10% to 12% growth compared to 2022. JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth viewed Chewy as a defensive stock, noting that most of Chewy's net sales (85%) are in non-discretionary goods and around 80% of its revenue comes from Autoship.
